/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libsource_lib.so -o libsource_lib.so CMakeFiles/source_lib.dir/Source/src/source.cc.o CMakeFiles/source_lib.dir/Source/src/socket_source.cc.o CMakeFiles/source_lib.dir/Source/src/pcap_source.cc.o CMakeFiles/source_lib.dir/Source/src/serial_source.cc.o CMakeFiles/source_lib.dir/Source/src/pcap_saver.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/unitree/argo_go2_ws/build/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/libhesai: libplatutils_lib.so libcontainer_lib.so libptcClient_lib.so libserialClient_lib.so -lssl -lcrypto
